facebook.caption: 4.2 stars. 190 reviews. Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo in the heart of Phu Quoc. This beach delivers exactly what you came for. Sand, sea, and no long drive to get there. Drop a pin, show up, and let the water do the rest. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
